title: Progress Bar/Single Status Colum

posts.author: BenOsu (Ben Osu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can you use the Progress Bar with just a single status bar?
So if the Status is ‘Working On It’ the Progress Bar shows x%. Likewise if the Status is ‘Awaiting Approval’ it shows another %

Rather than having numerous Status columns?

posts.author: wenlianzhang (Wella Zhang)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would suggest that instead of using a progress column, you add a number column, set it’s default value as “0”; and then create an automation: when “status” changed to “Awaiting Approval”, set the number column as 10%, likewise, when “status” changed to “working On it”, set the number column as 50%…
Hope this helps

posts.author: KehauGregory (Kehau Gregory)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to see this feature as well!
